pageContext.name: Inosuke Hashibira (Tengen Uzui Is Here!)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce the newest release, Inosuke Hashibira (Tengen Uzui Is Here!) Collectible Figure!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Inosuke Hashibira from the respected anime, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 3.9' tall, Inosuke Hashibira is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this Inosuke Hashibira Figure and enhance your Demon Slayer display with other incredible Ichibansho anime figures!
